summary: Batch Stamping feature fully tested and working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional, batch processing completes successfully with ZIP download.
critical_code_review_comments: Batch stamping endpoint requires CSRF token (not in CSRF_EXEMPT_PATHS) - this is correct for security
StampingService properly handles batch limits: 25 files max, 10MB per file, 200MB total, 50 pages per PDF
Each document gets unique stamp_id (format: TLS-YYYYMMDD-HEXID) and SHA256 hash binding
CSV summary correctly includes: filename, stamp_id, doc_hash, issued_at, pages_stamped, status, error
Frontend properly validates PDF files before upload (rejects non-PDF with toast message)
Anchor-based positioning working for all 7 position options
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch Stamping feature is fully implemented and tested. API endpoint: POST /api/documents/batch-stamp (requires CSRF token). Returns ZIP file with stamped PDFs and batch_summary_{batch_id}.csv. Batch history available at GET /api/documents/batch-stamps. Frontend at /batch-stamp route with drag-drop upload, anchor position selector, page mode toggle, and batch processing.

features_verified.POST /api/documents/batch-stamp - single: PASS - Returns ZIP with stamped PDF and CSV
features_verified.POST /api/documents/batch-stamp - multip: PASS - Each document gets unique stamp_id
features_verified.Page mode toggle: PASS - first (default) and all modes work
features_verified.File type validation: PASS - Rejects non-PDF files with error 400
features_verified.File size validation: PASS - 10MB per file, 200MB total limits enforced
features_verified.Frontend - Upload Documents dropzone: PASS - Drag-drop and click to browse
features_verified.Frontend - Selected Files list: PASS - Shows files with size, remove button
features_verified.Frontend - Page Mode dropdown: PASS - First Page Only / All Pages
features_verified.Frontend - Process button: PASS - Disabled until files added and recipient filled
